lines: the malison coils low behind a curtain of vines
scales flash green then vanish into shadow again
a forked tongue tastes the air before the strike
poison drips slow from a fang aimed at your neck
torches flare as the serpent lord rears up tall
the yuan ti hisses and slides behind cracked stone
a rapier flicks out from the dark twisting coils
your blade meets scale and sparks off with a hiss
green eyes blink slow from the shrine of old gold
the coil tightens then snaps open in one strike
a hood of scales spreads wide before the lunge
poison hums along the blade as it swings for you
the boss rises from a nest of carved stone snakes
a hiss rolls through the trees like a warning bell
scales click on stone as the malison circles you
the serpent lord flicks its tail and strikes fast
a green blur drops from the vines above your head
the malison smiles with a mouth full of old venom
torchlight catches fangs bared in the dark forest
a coil wraps the shrine steps in loose green scale
the fight opens with a hiss and a flash of steel
poison mist curls low across the cracked stone floor
your dodge is quick but the tail catches your boot
a rapier spins once then aims for your open guard
the malison rears back and calls for its snakes
green scale glints under torches near the old shrine
a strike lands and the serpent recoils with a hiss
the boss slithers behind broken pillars for cover
poison drips from a fang as the coil pulls tight
your blade catches the rapier in a shower of sparks
the malison hisses a word and the forest goes still
a shadow with scales slides past the shrine gate
torches gutter as the serpent lord looms closer
the fight turns fast when the coil finds your arm
green fangs snap shut just short of your shoulder
a hiss and a lunge and the malison is on you again
poison stings where the fang grazed your sleeve
the serpent king coils twice before the next strike
your parry rings off scale in the dim forest light
a rapier thrust slides past your guard and misses
the malison rears with both arms raised for a spell
green light gathers at the tip of a raised claw
a firebolt cracks the air near the shrine steps
the coil recoils then whips low toward your legs
poison hums in the air after the fang draws back
your blade finds the gap between two thick scales
the malison hisses low and slides into the dark
a scale shield turns your strike with a dull clank
torches throw long shadows across the shrine floor
the serpent lord strikes twice before you can move
green coils tangle the roots near the old altar
a final hiss echoes as the malison falls at last
poison fades slow from the blade after the win
the forest goes quiet once the last scale stops
